stories.title: Belgian GP Race Week Begins — Spa Braces for Wet Qualifying Weekend

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Belgian GP week is HERE.

FP1: Friday 7:30AM ET
Qualifying: Saturday 10AM ET
Race: Sunday 9AM ET

Antonelli leads 179-154 over Russell. Hamilton 32 pts back.

Three-way championship fight. At Spa. In the rain. Buckle up.

#F1 #BelgianGP

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Championship standings heading into the Belgian GP:

No. 1 Antonelli — 179 pts
No. 2 Russell — 154 pts (-25)
No. 3 Hamilton — 147 pts (-32)
No. 4 Leclerc — ~108 pts

Two races before the summer break. Everything is still on.

#F1 #BelgianGP

article.headline: Belgian GP Race Week Preview: Schedule, Championship Stakes, and Why Rain Changes Everything at Spa

stories.title: Verstappen Exit Clause — Formal Activation Window Closes After Hungary

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Max Verstappen has 13 days to formally activate his Red Bull exit clause.

The deadline: the day after the Hungarian GP.

The math: already done. He cannot reach P2 before the break.

What does he do? McLaren? Retirement? The paddock is watching.

#F1 #Verstappen

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Red Bull gave Max Verstappen a contract. They included an exit clause.

Now the clause is active. The deadline is July 28.

McLaren says no talks. Multiple sources say "closing stages."

One of these is lying.

#F1 #Verstappen

article.headline: Verstappen's Exit Clause Is Active — 13 Days Remain Before the Formal Deadline

stories.title: Hamilton's Ferrari 2027 Extension Confirmed — Vasseur Says "Yes"

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Fred Vasseur was asked if Lewis Hamilton will stay at Ferrari in 2027.

His answer: "Yes."

That's it. That's the tweet.

Hamilton + Leclerc at Ferrari for 2027. The lineup is set.

#F1 #LewisHamilton #Ferrari

article.headline: Lewis Hamilton Staying at Ferrari in 2027 — Fred Vasseur Gives the One-Word Answer That Changes Everything

stories.title: Spa Weather — Wet Qualifying on the Cards for Saturday

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Belgian GP qualifying: 65% chance of rain.

The track that Hamilton has won 6 times. The track Antonelli finished P16 at last year.

A wet Saturday in Spa could reshape the entire championship picture.

#F1 #BelgianGP

article.headline: Spa Weather Watch: 65% Rain for Belgian GP Qualifying Could Scramble the Championship Picture

stories.title: Antonelli's Spa Redemption Arc — Worst Weekend Becomes Championship Decider

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
At Spa 2025, Kimi Antonelli was knocked out in Q1 and finished P16.

This weekend at Spa 2026, he arrives as F1 championship leader.

Same track. Different driver. Can he exorcise his demons?

#F1 #BelgianGP #Antonelli

article.headline: From P16 to Championship Leader: Kimi Antonelli Returns to Spa for His Biggest Test Yet
